description: Triggers when user wants to execute an implementation plan using subagents in the current session with two-stage review
should_trigger: Execute this implementation plan using subagents
Dispatch subagents to implement my plan
Implement all the tasks in this plan with reviews
Run the plan in this session with spec and quality review
Use subagent-driven development to execute my plan here
should_not_trigger: Write an implementation plan for this feature
Execute tasks in a separate parallel session
